mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUITION_BILL (USER_ID, BILL_YM, BILL_ITEM_CD, BILL_AMT, DUE_DT, BILL_STAT_CD) SELECT s.USER_ID, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM'), '01', s.BILL_AMT, s.DUE_DT, '01' FROM ( SELECT m.USER_ID, LEAST( TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') + (TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.JOIN_DT, 'DD')) - 1), TRUNC(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)) ) AS DUE_DT, (SELECT NVL(SUM(co.COURSE_PRICE), 0) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cm.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE co ON cl.COURSE_SN = co.COURSE_SN WHERE cm.USER_ID = m.USER_ID AND TRIM(cm.ENRL_STAT_CD) = '01') AS BILL_AMT FROM MEMBER m WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_STUDENT' ) s WHERE s.BILL_AMT > 0 AND s.DUE_DT BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 3 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TUITION_BILL b WHERE b.USER_ID = s.USER_ID AND b.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') )
mapper.update: UPDATE TUITION_BILL SET BILL_STAT_CD = '02', MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) = '01' AND DUE_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_BLACK_LIST_HISTORY (BLKLST_STD_USER_ID, BLKLST_RSN_CN, BLKLST_RGTR_USER_ID) SELECT t.USER_ID, '원비 누적 미납 ' || t.CNT || '회 (배치 자동 등록)', 'SYSTEM' FROM ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TUITION_BILL WHERE TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02') GROUP BY USER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold} ) t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST bl WHERE bl.STD_USER_ID = t.USER_ID )

INSERT INTO STUDENT_BLACK_LIST (STD_USER_ID, BLKLST_STRT_DT) SELECT t.USER_ID, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TUITION_BILL WHERE TRIM(BILL_STAT_CD) IN ('01', '02') GROUP BY USER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold} ) t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_BLACK_LIST bl WHERE bl.STD_USER_ID = t.USER_ID )
